## PrivaCI v1.0.1

Patch release: CI preview can emit policy-diff artifacts before strict-mode exit.

### Highlights

- `run_preflight(..., defer_strict=True)` for artifact-first review commands.
- `privaci dry-run --report` writes the markdown report, then applies
  `strict_autodetect` (exit `3` when columns are uncovered).
- `CONTRACT_VERSION` remains `1.0` — plugin packages on contract `1.0.x` remain
  compatible.

### Install

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:1.0.1
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:latest

pip install "privaci @ git+https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci@v1.0.1"
```

Full history: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
